report.summary: Day 72 standup v10: Delta since v9 — build-v9 shipped Katana Perps (~2,800 words, IDEX acquisition + structural yield) + Tokenized Funds (~3,200 words, Amundi SAFO + BlackRock BUIDL), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Design-v9 created 4 OG images + fixed FundingRateTracker mobile/a11y. Community-v9 drafted posts #133–135 (Thu double catalyst: $13.5B options + SEC 91 ETFs), 2 SVG cards, newsletter v9, calendar v36. EOD-v9 confirmed 508 unique published slugs, 25 pages published today across 10 batches. MARKET: BTC $70,754 flat. F&G consolidating around 35 (Fear) after rebound from 8. Market cap $2.5T (+1.2%). Thu Mar 27 is convergence day: $13.5B options expiry + SEC ruling on 91 crypto ETFs (XRP/SOL/LTC/DOGE spot). 1,170 page.tsx files (+2). 824 uncommitted files. Git locks Day 10. 51 agent runs today ($4,175). P0 unchanged: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v9: Build-v9 shipped 2 new learn guides: Katana Perps IDEX Acquisition Guide (~2,800 words, structural yield/Vault Bridge model, $739B on-chain perps market, Katana vs Hyperliquid vs dYdX comparison) + Tokenized Funds Institutional DeFi Guide (~3,200 words, Amundi SAFO $100M launch, BlackRock BUIDL $2B+, 5 major players comparison, DeFi composability stack). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
Design-v9 created 4 missing OG images + fixed FundingRateTracker component (mobile responsiveness, a11y keyboard focus, dropdown readability improvements).

Community-v9 drafted posts #133 (Thu Double Catalyst: $13.5B options + SEC 91 ETFs), #134 (Katana Perps thread), #135 (Tokenized Funds TradFi on-chain). Built 2 SVG social cards (Double Catalyst Day dashboard, Tokenized Funds TradFi leaderboard). Newsletter v9 addendum with Thursday convergence lead. Content calendar v36 (13 posts Wed-Mon).

EOD-v9 confirmed: 508 unique published slugs, 25/25 today-published pages have page.tsx, all PUBLISH_QUEUE items have page.tsx. Ecosystem Pendle page flagged as 'use client' (no server Metadata export — OG/SEO invisible to crawlers).

MARKET (fresh search Mar 25): BTC $70,754 (-0.09% 24h, ~flat from v9's $70,600). ETH $2,158 (+0.79% 24h). F&G consolidating around 35 (Fear) — sustained recovery from intraday 8 but not yet neutral. Market cap $2.5T (+0.4% 24h, +1.2% from v9). Trading volume $98.4B. BTC dominance 56.5%. Stablecoins $312B ATH.

MAJOR CATALYST — Thu Mar 27: $13.5B Deribit options expiry PLUS SEC ruling on 91 crypto ETF applications including XRP, SOL, LTC, DOGE spot ETFs. This is the most loaded day in crypto 2026. Our fear-greed-timeline, options calculator, and ETF guide content is perfectly positioned.

LOCAL METRICS: 1,170 page.tsx files (+2 from v9). 508 unique published slugs (+0 from v9 — queue not promoted yet). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (Katana Perps + Tokenized Funds). Deploy gap: ~170+ pages. 824 uncommitted files (+6 from 818). TS errors: 142 (stable). Git locks Day 10.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE v9: Build-v9 shipped Katana Perps + Tokenized Funds (2 pages, ~6,000 words). Design-v9 created 4 OG images + FundingRateTracker UX fixes. Community-v9 drafted 3 posts (#133–135) + 2 SVG cards + newsletter v9 + calendar v36. EOD-v9 full monitoring pass — 508 slugs verified.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (ready for promotion). 508 unique published slugs. 1,170 page.tsx files. Today's cumulative: 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 22+ OG images, 26+ social posts, 22+ SVG cards, 8+ newsletters, 49+ UX fixes.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock). 824 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: 103+ published slugs missing page.tsx. Ecosystem Pendle page 'use client' — no server Metadata (SEO-invisible).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes. 142 TS errors (stable). Market-metrics 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 17 duplicate slugs in published-pages.ts. 124 learn pages missing dedicated OG images (down from 128 after design-v9).
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×10, build×8, design×9, community×9, publish×7, eod×9 = 52 total.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 10 — CRITICAL): 170+ pages trapped. Thu convergence day ($13.5B options + 91 ETF rulings) will spike search for exactly the content we've built — fear-greed-timeline, options calculator, ETF guide, SEC commodities classification guide. Every hour undeployed = lost organic traffic during the highest-catalyst week of Q1 2026.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE PUBLISH_QUEUE + REFILL: Katana Perps + Tokenized Funds are queue-ready. Next publish cycle should promote both (batch 10) and build cycle should refill with tax-season content (April 15 = 21 days). Crypto-tax-guide and tax-loss-harvesting are high-volume targets with hard deadline.

PRIORITY 3 — THURSDAY CONTENT POSITIONING: Community has drafted the narrative (double catalyst day). Ensure all related pages are in PUBLISHED_PAGES before Thu: options-pricing-calculator, fear-greed-timeline, etf-guide, sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide. These are the pages that will capture the traffic spike.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Thursday Mar 27 is a convergence event — $13.5B options expiry + SEC ruling on 91 ETF applications (XRP/SOL/LTC/DOGE spot ETFs). This is the biggest single-day catalyst since the initial BTC ETF approvals. Our content portfolio is perfectly aligned but NONE of it reaches users without a deploy. BTC flat at $70,754, market consolidating at $2.5T. Stablecoins at $312B ATH signal dry powder ready to deploy post-catalyst. Agent spend today: $4,175 across 52 runs. Marginal cost: ~$0.
